steps.title: Identify the grammatical subject
steps.content: The subject is “many works,” a plural noun. The phrase “particularly one abstract cubist painting by Marcel Duchamp” is a parenthetical aside that doesn't change the subject.

steps.title: Apply the agreement rule
steps.content: A plural subject requires a plural verb. “Were” is the plural past tense form that matches this agreement rule and the past time reference (“at the time”). The other three choices are all singular and violate subject-verb agreement. That matches choice B — B is correct.
